meaning: n.内容狂妄的作品,狂妄的言行
examples: "... it's the eleventh annual drag extravaganza, "said the other.
As did LA's Union Station, a magnificently restored Art Deco extravaganza.
Billed by its organisers as "the world's biggest tango extravaganza", it is, in fact, two events in one.
The momentum from this extravaganza of an opening probably helped sell tickets at ordinary prices afterward.
